rows.description: Polita Foria - Brought forward
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Row type and description ('Polita Foria') from gemini-flash, which aligns better with the visual text and ledger convention for 'Brought forward' as a total. gpt-5-mini's 'Soluta Varia' is less accurate.

rows.description: Mr Cowley, Builder, - Repairs of Houses in decemb. &c
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Repairs of Houses in decemb. &c', gpt-5-mini's 'expence of Houses in Queen St.' is incorrect.

rows.description: Mr Coe - Coroners Inquest on Mr Gillbee
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description combines elements from both, adjusting capitalization of 'Inquest' to match image and removing extraneous comma from gemini-flash.

rows.description: Do - Fees to the Groom and Bedel
rows.notes: Description and shillings/pence by consensus. Amount in pounds taken from gemini-flash (0), which correctly interprets the dash in the ledger as zero, consistent with common historical ledger practice. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '2' in the pounds column.

rows.description: Osborne for repairing pavements in Chancel &c
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash, which aligns more accurately with the visible text for this row. gpt-5-mini includes additional text ('at Kidlington (by Collr Order)') that is not part of this specific line item's description.

rows.description: Mr King, - balance of an Account for Work done at Cottages, Kidlington, late Hendlers
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash ('Mr King', 'Hendlers') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini ('Mrs King', 'Grindles').

rows.description: Mr Rupert's provisional Gift to L. Day
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash ('Mr Rupert's provisional Gift to L. Day') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini ('Mr Ashurst's provisional Exp to Day').

rows.description: Aries for Work at the Chancel, Kidlington &c
rows.notes: Shillings/pence by consensus. Pounds from gemini-flash (0), which correctly interprets the dash. gpt-5-mini's choice of '1' is uncertain and visually incorrect. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate ('Aries', '&c').

rows.description: Do - Do - Cottages at da
rows.notes: Shillings/pence by consensus. Pounds from gemini-flash (0), which correctly interprets the dash. gpt-5-mini's choice of '1' is uncertain and visually incorrect. Description from gemini-flash ('at da') is more accurate.

rows.description: Lynch - Bills - Little Tew
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash ('Lynch - Bills - Little Tew') is more accurate and clear than gpt-5-mini ('Lymath - Bills Little New').

rows.description: Bills allowed at St. Newington - Barn Dues 11s.8 from Bills & Tithes 3.3.0
rows.notes: This logical entry combines the descriptions from the first two physical lines in the image and the total amount from the third physical line (14 19 8). gemini-flash correctly identified the final amount, though assigned it to only the second descriptive line. gpt-5-mini misread the first line's amount, extracted an embedded amount from the second line, and then extracted the final total as a separate, undescribed total. My extraction combines the full description with the correct final amount.

rows.description: Stamp Receipts
rows.notes: Consensus on description, row type, and no amounts for this header line.

rows.description: Bills at Merton - Barn, Floor - 21-7-7 1/2 Paper for Parlor 2.12.6
rows.notes: This logical entry combines the descriptions from two physical lines in the image and the total amount 24 0 1/2 visible next to the second descriptive line. gemini-flash correctly assigned the final total amount to the second descriptive line, though it split the description. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted embedded amounts as column amounts for each descriptive line, misinterpreting the ledger structure.

rows.description: Allowed Mr Drew for his Lodgings
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash ('Lodgings') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini ('Dozings' / 'Doings').

rows.description: Barnett - Boat for Clifton Ferry
rows.notes: Consensus on description, amounts, and row type.

rows.description: Bowles - Tiles for Draining
rows.notes: Description and pounds/pence from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Bowles' and '3' for shillings. gpt-5-mini misread the surname as 'Rowley' and shillings as '5'. Visual verification confirms 'Bowles' and '3'.

rows.description: Provisional Expends, Merton, Rid 2. -
rows.notes: Pounds and pence by consensus. Description and shillings from gemini-flash, which accurately reads 'Expends' and '1' for shillings. gpt-5-mini misread description and shillings as '10'.

rows.description: Mr Harington - Repairs in St. Newington Chancel
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate regarding 'St.' abbreviation and capitalization of 'Repairs'.

rows.description: Mr Limber & L. Dew, Bills for Poles & training.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description from gemini-flash ('Mr Limber & L. Dew') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini ('Stimber L. New').

rows.description: Mr Falconer forwards repairs of Bushey Tenements - (by Order of Coll.)
rows.notes: This logical entry combines the descriptions from two physical lines in the image and the total amount 10 0 0 visible next to the second descriptive line (within the curly brace). gemini-flash correctly extracted the amount and the two parts of the description, but split them into two rows. gpt-5-mini assigned the amount to only the first part of the description and missed the full context of the braced entry.

rows.description: Half-years Property & Income Tax
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and row type. Description from gemini-flash is slightly more accurate ('Half-years Property & Income Tax' matches image closely).

rows.description: Mr Hastings on Acct of Works in process at Kidlington, & L. Dew -
rows.notes: This logical entry combines the descriptions from two physical lines in the image and the total amount 100 0 0 visible next to the second descriptive line (within the curly brace). gpt-5-mini correctly combined the description and amount, though its description had a minor error ('L. New'). gemini-flash split the description and amount into two rows. Description refined from gemini-flash ('L. Dew').

rows.description: St. Martins Tenements - Credit given to The College for the payments for 4 years to Mich. 1851 at (£16 11s per Ann: and which was not deducted from the Rent -
rows.notes: This logical entry combines the descriptions from two physical lines in the image and the total amount 7 7 8 visible next to the second descriptive line (within the curly brace). gemini-flash correctly extracted the full description text, but split it from the amount into separate rows. gpt-5-mini misread 'St. Martins' as 'Dr Martin's' and incorrectly split the description and amount. My extraction combines the correct full description with the amount.
